issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect. Card text says 'add 1 card from top or bottom of Life cards to hand' — this is DrawCard from Life pile, not FlipLife (which takes from hand to life). Should be DrawCard with source filter.
Missing optionality marker. Text says 'You may' — action should have optional:true
Missing count constraint. Action should specify count:1 to match 'up to 1'
